visual: Front leg bent with knee over the ankle, rear leg straight with foot angled outward, roughly 70% of weight on the front leg.
motion_description: The individual begins in a wide stance, shifting weight onto the bent right leg while straightening the left leg behind. The left arm sweeps upward and across in a large circular trajectory, ending bent near the right shoulder. Simultaneously, the right arm extends outward and then sweeps downward. The torso rotates slightly to the right, completing the sequence in a slow, continuous flow.
